docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LING, GLORIA AS TO DEFENDANT TOWNSEND, GREGORY DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED
